titleStmt.title: SII 9.459: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 459. (A.R. No. 406 of 1928.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE OUTER PRAKARA OF THE MAHALINGESVARA TEMPLE AT BASRUR, COONDAPUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1387, Pārthiva, Vaiśākha, ba. 5, Bu[dhavāra] corresponding to A.D. 1465 May 15 Wednesday, in the reign of Prauḍha-Immaḍi-Dēvarāya Mallikārjuna-Mahārāya. It records that when Paṇḍaridēva-Oḍeya was ruling over Bārakūra-rājya under the orders of the Mahāpradhāna Rāmachandra-Daṇāyaka, he made a gift of the gold, which the Hañjamāna community was paying, for the service of the god Mahādēva at Paḍuvakēri, on the occasion of a lunar eclipse.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . śrīsarasvatyāya namaḥ . nirvighnamastu . namastuṁ
gaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trayilōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁ
bhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrījayābhyudayaśakavaruṣa 1387 neya
varttamāna pārthivasaṁvatsarada vayiśākha bahuḷa 5 bu lū śrīmanma
hārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa prauḍha yiṁma
ḍidēvarāya mallikārjunamahārāyaru vijayānagariya siṁ
hāsanadali kuḷittu sakalavarnnāśramadharmmaṁgaḷanū pratipālisutiha kā
ladalli Ā prauḍhadēvarāyamahārāyara Āgñārādhakaruma
pa śrīma(ṁ)nmahāpradhāna rāmacaṁdradaṇāyakaOḍeyara nirūpa
diṁda paṁḍaridēvaOḍeyaru bārakūra tuḷurājyavanāḷuva kā
ladalu A paṁḍaridēvaOḍeyaru basuṟūra paḍuvakēriya mahā
dēvarige sōmagrahaṇadali dhārāpūrvvakavāgi māḍida dharmma mosarōgara A
mrutapaḍi naṁdādīpti �yo mūṟu bageya dhar(ṁ)mmake dhāreyaneṟaddu
basaṟūra Oḷagaṇa haṁjamānadavaru naṁma Aramanege teṟuva
haḍikeya hoṁnanū teṟuvadake tīrade Ā haṁjamānadavaru
taṁma paḷimariyādeya hoṁnina kaṭaḷeyanu Aramane
ge koṭa A paḷimariyādeyali bahaṁthā kāṭigadyāna nūṟa
Ayivattu hoṁnanu paṁḍaridēvaOḍeyaru tāu māḍida dhar(ṁ)
mmake kālakālake Ācaṁdrārkkavāgi naḍavaṁtāgi dhāreyanu ye
ṟadu koṭu taṁma svarūciyiṁda Oḍaṁbaṭu barasi koṭṭa
dhar(ṁ)mmaśilāśāsana yī paḷimariyādeya hoṁna yettikoṁ
ba vivara basaṟūra Aḷuveya hasarake
ya Oḷagiṁda hōhaṁthā sarakigū Obba taḷada sē
nabōvana mariyādeya sariteyalū �yo hoṁnanu
yettikoṁbudu . dānapālanayōr(ṁ)mmadhyē dānācrē
yōnrupālanaṁ . dānāsvargamavāpnōti pālanādacu
taṁ padaṁ . vāgduttaṁ manōdattaṁ dhārādattaṁ dinē di
nē . śaṣṭirvvaruṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi[ḥ .*]
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭhi
rvvaruṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi[ḥ .*] paṁḍaridē
vaŌḍeyara Opa maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.459 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
